seoTitle: Camena vs Campbell Town — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camena and Campbell Town. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camena vs Campbell Town: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camena and Campbell Town.
heading: Camena vs Campbell Town — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camena, Tasmania and Campbell Town, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camena has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Campbell Town (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camena or Campbell Town safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camena has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Campbell Town scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camena scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Campbell Town scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camena or Campbell Town?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
